response.justification: Strong senior software engineer with broad full-stack experience, open-source contributions (GISCollective), Linux familiarity, and a track record of mentoring/teaching. However, the role demands German at C1 minimum and the candidate only lists basic German, which is a hard requirement gap. Formal IT architecture leadership, UML modeling, and explicit team-lead/management experience are also underrepresented relative to an executive-level Head of Development role.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack experience across web, mobile, embedded, and Linux/open-source ecosystems
Founder of an open-source GIS platform demonstrating architecture ownership and long-term project leadership
Proven knowledge-sharing through workshops, courses, and conference talks (mentoring aptitude)
concerns: German listed as only Basic — falls well short of the required C1 proficiency
No explicit Head-of-Development, team-lead, or people-management title in employment history
Limited evidence of formal UML modeling, requirements management, and IT security/compliance practice
